generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow woman who values security and stability, I've been really concerned about how our reliance on foreign tech puts our national defense at risk. It's not just about having the latest gadgets - it's about ensuring our military and critical infrastructure can operate safely without being vulnerable to foreign interference. I've seen firsthand how local businesses in my community have struggled when supply chains were disrupted. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't about isolation - it's about responsible, forward-thinking security. Our children deserve to grow up in a country that puts their safety first. #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
